query:
ALTER TABLE positions 
ADD COLUMN spreadType ENUM('bull_put', 'bear_call', 'iron_condor') NULL AFTER status,
ADD COLUMN longStrike VARCHAR(20) NULL AFTER spreadType,
ADD COLUMN spreadWidth INT NULL AFTER longStrike,
ADD COLUMN capitalAtRisk VARCHAR(20) NULL AFTER spreadWidth;
